'''''Varn, World of Water''''' was a [[holodocumentary]] feature about the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Varn]]. Though it was quite dull, it fascinated the [[Kamarian]] [[Kamarian Badlander|Badlanders]] so much when [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] exhibited the documentary to them at his makeshift [[Holotheater/Legends|holotheater]] that they started a religion around it. Solo failed to realize its significance due to communication difficulties and tried to replace it with with the drama ''[[Love is Waiting]]'', causing the [[Cult of Varn]] to riot. Han and his companions escaped in the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|Millennium Falcon]].
